Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 6 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}Let's see... My large items have been shipped... Am I forgetting anything...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}I just got word. Our transportation will be here shortly.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}You're taking everyone else too?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}Yes, their new dorms are on the way to the lab anyway.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}And since we're all here, I thought we might as well travel together. It would be dull otherwise.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 2 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}Has anyone seen Junpei? I told him not to be late...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}I bet he's trying to carry everything at once. Just ignore him.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}He did the same thing last year.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 4 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}I see... That sounded like it really hurt, though...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 6 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}Owww, my face... No one saw that, right?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}Are you all right? Can't leave him alone for five minutes...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 12 3 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}I, uh... I know it's last-minute and might be too late, but...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 12 3 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}Would it be okay for me to... not go back to the lab?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 12 3 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}Before... I thought I'd lost my purpose. My reason to live...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 12 3 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}But now I realize that isn't the case.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 12 3 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 23 0 0}If possible... I would like to keep attending school with Yukari-san and everyone.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 12 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 25 0 0}I want to continue experiencing new things with you all![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 3 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 28 0 0}Well... It would be difficult, since I'm no longer involved with Gekkoukan High...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 29 0 0}{f 5 21 0 20}Your transportation has arrived, ma'am.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_023_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 32 0 0}I apologize, but there's been a sudden change in plans. We'll now be going to the school's Tatsumi Hall.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 33 0 0}The transfer to the lab has been canceled.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_025_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 11 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 35 0 0}Hell yeah! That's what I'm talkin' about![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_026_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 12 1 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 37 0 0}It's an honor to be able to stay with you all![n]{f 1 1}
